zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Portman於1610年5月21日出生在英國薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼時，她的父親Sir John Portman 1st Baronet48歲，母親Anne Gifford36歲。她於1630年與Edward Seymour在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1695年在英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Portman于1610年5月21日出生在英国薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼时，她的父亲Sir John Portman 1st Baronet48岁，母亲Anne Gifford36岁。她于1630年与Edward Seymour在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1695年在英国戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Portman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): status name from Middle English portman ‘townsman, burgher, citizen’ (Old English portmann).

Dutch: from poort ‘gate’ + man ‘man’, an occupational name for a gatekeeper or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a walled town. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the more common variant Poortman.

variants.name: Sportsman
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Flemish Sportmans: patronymic from Poortman (see Portman 2), genitivized by the initial s (from des ‘of the’) and the suffix -s.

variants.name: Portmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Franz, Hansi, Kurt.

North German: occupational name for a gatekeeper, from Middle Low German port(e) ‘gate’ (from Latin porta) + man ‘man’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town. Compare Porter .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Portman was born on 21 May 1610, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John Portman 1st Baronet, was 48 and her mother, Anne Gifford, was 36. She married Edward Seymour in 1630, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1695, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Portman est née le 21 mai 1610, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Portman 1st Baronet, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Anne Gifford, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Seymour en 1630, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1695, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Portmanが1610年5月21日にイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンで生まれた時，父Sir John Portman 1st Baronetは48歳，母Anne Giffordは36歳であった。1630年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでEdward Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1695年にイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Portman(이)가 1610년 5월 21일 영국 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Portman 1st Baronet(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Gifford(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1630년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Edward Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1695년 영국 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Portman родилась 21 мая 1610 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Portman 1st Baronet было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Gifford, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Seymour в 1630 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1695 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
